goal: Add a one-command v0 release blocker recertification runner that refreshes the current real-adapter candidate scan, CUDA training prereq preflight, M6 real-adapter prereq audit, evidence bundle verification, v0 readiness, and CUDA handoff artifacts without weakening release policy or claiming GO.
head: fe211e8
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add a local recertification orchestration script, focused tests, refreshed current NOT_GO review artifacts, WORKING.md, and this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: One command refreshes candidate scan, CUDA training preflight, M6 prereq audit, bundle verification, v0 readiness, and CUDA handoff artifacts
Recertification summary refuses release GO unless v0 readiness is GO and reports NOT_GO current blocker state
Focused tests cover successful current NOT_GO recertification and refusal when an expected child command fails
Current local v0 readiness remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
warnings: M6-RC and v0 remain NOT_GO until real trained CUDA adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exists.
This gate only orchestrates existing strict checks; it does not edit release review docs or verifier acceptance criteria.

phase_notes.plan: Add one-command recertification for the current release blocker evidence chain.
phase_notes.audit: Existing strict checks are present but must be run as a manual multi-command sequence to refresh coherent current NOT_GO evidence.
phase_notes.build: Created a runner that executes existing strict scripts, writes a summary, and regenerates candidate scan, CUDA preflight, M6 preflight, bundle verification, readiness, and handoff artifacts without claiming GO.
phase_notes.check: JSON contract, py_compile, focused pytest, recertification run, summary/readiness json.tool, rg evidence, m1-smoke bootstrap, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check passed.
phase_notes.done: Phase verified. Current recertification is NOT_GO_V0_RELEASE_BLOCKER_RECERTIFICATION with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole v0 release blocker.

pabcd.approved_scope: Local recertification runner, focused tests, refreshed current NOT_GO review artifacts, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product code changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
